span.title: Set Executor in Work Orders first
Set Executor in Work Orders first

div.span: Set Executor in Work Orders first

div.p: Enter your Requestor password to add a Work Order Mold. Your name becomes the Requestor.

t.div: No molds. Ask admin to add them in Master Mold.

div.label: Job Type
div.div: Repair (set automatically — change it in Work Orders)

div.label: Req Date (tgl/bulan/tahun)
div.span: Cukup ketik angka — "/" otomatis. Atau klik kalender.

t.span: No options. Use the wrench to add.

div.p: Enter the Teknisi password, complete the Detail checklist, then fill Lead Time & Finish Repair. Recorded in the Work Order history.

div.label:
Detail Checklist
/
div.span: Complete all checklist items to enable Lead Time & Finish Repair.

div.label: Lead Time (Hour) (locked)
div.span: Tambahan jam dihitung otomatis saat mengisi Finish Repair lagi setelah reject.

div.p: Enter the Requestor password, then choose Approve (Yes) or Reject (No). Detail is optional.
Create users for two roles: Requestor (adds & approves WO) and Teknisi Repair (fills Lead Time & Finish Repair). Each user just enters their password.
